pages.text: Brawny humanoid. Bipedal orc-blooded, large and broad. Built for melee.$(br2)Height: 1.08$(br)Width: 1.08$(br2)$(bold)Low-Light Vision.$(/) Faint night vision (strength 0.3). Does not function underwater.$(br2)$(bold)Savage Attacks.$(/) Melee damage +1.$(br2)$(bold)Relentless Endurance.$(/) When health drops to 1 heart or below, grants brief Resistance V (5 seconds) and Regeneration II (3 seconds). 5-minute cooldown.$(br2)$(bold)Dull to Magic.$(/) Spell power -20% in arcane, fire, frost, and healing.
